        rw [ENNReal.smul_def, ENNReal.coe_add, smul_eq_mul, ENNReal.toReal_mul, ENNReal.toReal_coe,
            ENNReal.toReal_ofReal (inv_nonneg.2 zero_le_two)]
        rw [show -(2⁻¹ * (x:ℝ) + 2⁻¹ * (y:ℝ)) = -x/2 + -y/2 by ring, Real.exp_add, Real.exp_mul, Real.exp_mul,
            Real.sqrt_sq (Real.exp_pos _).le, Real.sqrt_sq (Real.exp_pos _).le]
        ring_nf; field_simp; ring_nf; rw [Real.exp_mul, Real.exp_mul]; ring
      all_goals simp [u, ENNReal.top_add, ENNReal.add_top, ENNReal.smul_top, ENNReal.coe_ne_top]; field_simp; try ring
    simp_rw [← integral_sub (hv_mem n).integrable (hv_mem m).integrable,
      ← integral_mul_left, ← integral_add (hv_mem n).integrable.div_const (hv_mem m).integrable.div_const,
      alg_ident] at hN
    refine lt_of_le_of_lt (le_of_eq ?_) hN
    simp only [v, sub_sq, one_div, integral_mul_left]
  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := completeness_Lp (fun n ↦ (hv_mem n).toLp v) hv_cauchy
  obtain ⟨σ, hσ⟩ := TendstoInMeasure.exists_seq_tendsto_ae (fun n ↦ (hv_mem n).aestronglyMeasurable)
    (tendsto_in_measure_of_tendsto_Lp (p := 2) two_ne_zero ENNReal.two_ne_top hf)
  let Y_lim (ω : Ω) : ℝ≥0∞ := if f ω ≤ 0 then ⊤ else ENNReal.ofReal (-Real.log (f ω))
  refine ⟨fun k ↦ g (σ k), Y_lim, fun k ↦ ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
  · convert convexHull_mono (Set.range_subset_range (fun m ↦ m + (σ k - k)) (fun m ↦ by dsimp; abel)) (hg_hull (σ k))
    simp [Nat.add_sub_of_le (StrictMono.id_le σ k)]
  · exact measurable_of_real.comp (measurable_id.neg.comp (measurable_log.comp f.2.measurable)) |>.ennreal_ofReal |>.ite
      (f.2.measurable.le measurable_const) measurable_const
  · filter_upwards [hσ] with ω hω
    have h_cont : ContinuousAt (fun y : ℝ ↦ if y ≤ 0 then ⊤ else ENNReal.ofReal (-Real.log y)) (f ω) := by
      by_cases hf0 : f ω ≤ 0
      · refine (tendsto_nhds_within_of_tendsto_nhds (tendsto_const_nhds.mpr rfl)).continuousAt
          (Filter.mem_inf_of_left <| IsOpen.mem_nhds isOpen_Iic hf0)
      · push_neg at hf0; rw [if_neg (not_le.2 hf0)]
        exact (ENNReal.continuous_ofReal.comp (continuous_neg.comp (continuous_log hf0.ne'))).continuousAt
    have : f ω = Real.sqrt (u (Y_lim ω)) := by
      dsimp [Y_lim]; split_ifs with h
      · simp [u, Real.sqrt_eq_zero, h]
      · simp [u, ENNReal.toReal_ofReal (neg_nonneg.2 (Real.log_nonpos (by
          by_contra hc; rw [if_neg (not_le.2 (lt_of_lt_of_le one_lt_top hc.le))] at h
          apply h; exact ENNReal.ofReal_pos.1 hc))), Real.exp_log (not_le.1 h)]
    rw [this] at h_cont ⊢
    refine h_cont.tendsto.comp <| (Real.continuous_sqrt.tendsto _).comp <|
      (Real.continuous_exp.tendsto _).comp <| (continuous_neg.tendsto _).comp <|
      ENNReal.tendsto_toReal (hω.comp (tendsto_getElement_atTop _))

let v : ℝ≥0∞ → ℝ := fun x ↦ ENNReal.toReal (1 + x)⁻¹
  let φ : (Ω → ℝ≥0∞) → ℝ := fun f ↦ ∫ ω, v (f ω) ∂P
  obtain ⟨g, hg_mem, hg_lim⟩ := komlos_convex (E := Ω → ℝ≥0∞) (φ := φ) (f := X)
    (fun f ↦ integral_nonneg fun ω ↦ by simp [v]; exact ENNReal.toReal_nonneg)
    ⟨1, fun n ↦ prob_integral_le_of_le P _ fun ω ↦ by
      simp [v]; exact ENNReal.toReal_le_of_le_ofReal (by norm_num) (by simp)⟩
  -- The sequence g is Cauchy in measure due to strict convexity of v and hg_lim.
  -- We extract a subsequence converging a.s.
  have : ∃ f, TendstoInMeasure atTop P g f := sorry
  obtain ⟨Y_lim, h_lim⟩ := this
  obtain ⟨k, hk_mono, hk_tendsto⟩ := TendstoInMeasure.exists_seq_tendsto_ae h_lim
  refine ⟨fun n ↦ g (k n + n), Y_lim, fun n ↦ ?_, sorry, ?_⟩
  · convert hg_mem (k n + n) using 1
    refine convexHull_mono (Set.range_subset_iff.mpr fun m ↦ ?_) (convex_convexHull _ _)
    use m + k n; simp [add_assoc, add_comm]
  · filter_upwards [hk_tendsto] with ω hω
    exact (tendsto_add_atTop_iff_nat (k ·)).1 hω

let u (x : ℝ≥0∞) : ℝ := if x = ⊤ then 0 else Real.exp (-x.toReal)
  have hu : ∀ x, 0 ≤ u x := fun x ↦ by split_ifs <;> [rfl; exact Real.exp_pos _ |>.le]
  have hu_bdd : ∀ x, u x ≤ 1 := fun x ↦ by split_ifs <;> [zero_le_one; exact Real.exp_le_one_iff.2 (neg_nonpos.2 x.toReal_nonneg)]
  obtain ⟨g, hg_conv, hg_lim⟩ := komlos_convex (φ := fun f ↦ ∫ ω, u (f ω) ∂P) (fun f ↦ integral_nonneg fun _ ↦ hu _)
    ⟨1, fun n ↦ integral_le_one_of_le_one fun _ ↦ hu_bdd _⟩
  have h_cauchy : CauchySeq atTop fun n ↦ (fun ω ↦ u (g n ω)) := by
    refine Metric.cauchySeq_iff'.2 fun ε hε ↦ ?_
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hg_lim (ε^2/16) (by positivity)
    refine ⟨N, fun n m hn hm ↦ ?_⟩
    specialize hN n m hn hm
    simp only [integral_sub, integral_add, integral_smul] at hN
    have key (x y : ℝ≥0∞) : u ((2 : ℝ≥0)⁻¹ • (x + y)) = Real.sqrt (u x * u y) := by
      by_cases h : x = ⊤ ∨ y = ⊤
      · rcases h with rfl | rfl <;> simp [u, top_add, add_top]
      · push_neg at h
        simp [u, h, ENNReal.toReal_smul, ENNReal.toReal_add, Real.exp_div_two_eq_sqrt]
    simp_rw [key, show ∀ a b : ℝ, 2⁻¹ * a + 2⁻¹ * b - Real.sqrt (a * b) = 2⁻¹ * (Real.sqrt a - Real.sqrt b)^2 from fun a b ↦ by ring_nf; rw [Real.sq_sqrt (hu a), Real.sq_sqrt (hu b)]; ring] at hN
    rw [← integral_sub (Integrable.const _ _ _ |>.add (Integrable.const _ _ _)) (Integrable.const _ _ _), ← integral_mul_left] at hN
    calc ∫ ω, |u (g n ω) - u (g m ω)| ∂P
      _ ≤ ∫ ω, 2 * |Real.sqrt (u (g n ω)) - Real.sqrt (u (g m ω))| ∂P := integral_mono_ae (Integrable.const _ _ _ |>.sub (Integrable.const _ _ _) |>.abs) (Integrable.const _ _ _) (Eventually.of_forall fun ω ↦ by
          rw [← abs_mul, sub_mul_add, Real.sq_sqrt (hu _ _), Real.sq_sqrt (hu _ _)]; gcongr; exact add_le_add (Real.sqrt_le_one.2 (hu_bdd _)) (Real.sqrt_le_one.2 (hu_bdd _)))
      _ ≤ 2 * (∫ ω, (Real.sqrt (u (g n ω)) - Real.sqrt (u (g m ω))) ^ 2 ∂P) ^ (1/2 : ℝ) := by
          gcongr; convert integral_abs_le_sqrt_integral_sq_norm _ using 2; simp [Real.norm_eq_abs]
      _ < 2 * (2 * (ε ^ 2 / 16)) ^ (1/2 : ℝ) := by gcongr; rw [Real.sqrt_eq_rpow]; linarith
      _ ≤ ε := by have : 0 ≤ ε := hε.le; field_simp; linarith [sq_nonneg (ε/2)]
  obtain ⟨Z, -, hZ⟩ := MeasureTheory.cauchySeq_tendsto_of_complete h_cauchy
  obtain ⟨ns, hns, h_ae⟩ := TendstoInMeasure.exists_seq_tendsto_ae (tendsto_in_measure_of_tendsto_L1 hZ)
  let u_inv (y : ℝ) : ℝ≥0∞ := if y ≤ 0 then ⊤ else if y ≥ 1 then 0 else ENNReal.ofReal (-Real.log y)
  refine ⟨fun k ↦ g (ns k), fun ω ↦ u_inv (Z ω), fun n ↦ ?_, Measurable.ite measurable_const measurable_const (Measurable.ite measurable_const measurable_const (Measurable.ennreal_ofReal.comp (Measurable.neg (Measurable.log hZ.measurable)))), ?_⟩
  · exact convexHull_mono (Set.range_subset_iff.2 fun m ↦ ⟨ns n - n + m, by rw [add_assoc, Nat.sub_add_cancel (hns.ge.trans (Nat.le_add_right _ _))]⟩) (hg_conv (ns n))
  · filter_upwards [h_ae] with ω hω
    have eq_inv (x : ℝ≥0∞) : u_inv (u x) = x := by
      by_cases h : x = ⊤; · simp [h, u, u_inv]
      simp [u, h, u_inv]; rw [if_neg, if_neg]; · simp
      · push_neg; exact Real.exp_lt_one_iff.2 (neg_neg_of_pos x.toReal_pos)
      · push_neg; exact Real.exp_pos _
    rw [Tendsto, ← eq_inv (u_inv (Z ω))]
    apply Filter.Tendsto.comp _ hω
    have H : ContinuousOn u_inv (Set.Icc 0 1) := by
      refine ContinuousOn.if continuous_const.continuousOn continuous_const.continuousOn ?_ ?_
      · refine ContinuousOn.if continuous_const.continuousOn (Continuous.ennreal_ofReal.comp (continuous_neg.comp continuous_log)).continuousOn ?_ ?_
        · rintro x ⟨hx0, hx1⟩ hx; simp at hx; rw [hx, Real.log_one, neg_zero, ENNReal.ofReal_zero]
        · rintro x ⟨hx0, hx1⟩ hx; simp at hx; rw [hx]; exact ENNReal.top_ne_zero.symm
      · rintro x ⟨hx0, hx1⟩ hx; simp at hx; rw [hx]; exact ENNReal.top_ne_zero.symm
    apply (H _ ⟨le_of_tendsto hω (Eventually.of_forall fun _ ↦ ⟨hu _, hu_bdd _⟩) |>.1, le_of_tendsto hω (Eventually.of_forall fun _ ↦ ⟨hu _, hu_bdd _⟩) |>.2⟩).tendsto.comp
    rw [tendsto_nhdsWithin_iff, eventually_iff_exists_mem]
    exact ⟨_, hω, fun y hy ↦ ⟨hy, ⟨hu _, hu_bdd _⟩⟩⟩

obtain ⟨φ, hφ, f, hf, htf⟩ := tendsto_subseq_ae P X hX
  refine ⟨fun n ↦ X (φ n), f, fun n ↦ ?_, hf, htf⟩
  refine subset_convexHull ℝ≥0∞ _ (Set.mem_range.2 ⟨φ n - n, ?_⟩)
  rw [add_tsub_cancel_of_le (hφ.id_le _)]

let u : ℝ≥0∞ → ℝ := fun x ↦ if x = ⊤ then 0 else Real.exp (-x.toReal)
  have u_meas : Measurable u :=
    Measurable.ite (measurable_set_singleton ⊤) measurable_const
      (measurable_id.ennreal_toReal.neg.exp)
  let φ : (Ω → ℝ≥0∞) → ℝ := fun f ↦ (∫⁻ ω, ENNReal.ofReal (u (f ω)) ∂P).toReal
  have hφ_nonneg : 0 ≤ φ := fun f ↦ ENNReal.toReal_nonneg
  have hφ_bdd : ∃ M, ∀ n, φ (X n) ≤ M := ⟨1, fun n ↦ by
    apply ENNReal.toReal_le_of_le_ofReal zero_le_one
    refine lintegral_le_one_of_le_ae (eventually_of_forall fun ω ↦ ?_)
    by_cases h : X n ω = ⊤ <;> simp [u, h, Real.exp_le_one_iff]⟩
  obtain ⟨g, hg_mem, hg_conv⟩ := komlos_convex hφ_nonneg hφ_bdd
  have hg_meas : ∀ n, Measurable (g n) := fun n ↦ by
    refine convexHull_min (Set.range_subset_iff.2 fun m ↦ hX (n + m))
      (convex_measurable (m := mΩ) (μ := P) (R := ℝ≥0) (S := ℝ≥0∞)) (hg_mem n)
  let δ : ℕ → ℝ := fun k ↦ (1/2) ^ (2 * k + 2)
  choose N hN using fun k ↦ hg_conv (δ k) (by positivity)
  let M : ℕ → ℕ := Nat.rec (N 0) fun k nk ↦ max (N (k + 1)) (nk + 1)
  have hM_mono : StrictMono M := Nat.strictMono_nat_of_lt_succ fun n ↦
    Nat.lt_succ_iff.1 (le_max_right _ _)
  let Y := fun k ↦ g (M k)
  let v (f : Ω → ℝ≥0∞) (ω : Ω) := Real.sqrt (u (f ω))
  let Z_seq (k : ℕ) (ω : Ω) := v (Y k) ω
  have h_diff : ∀ k, ∫⁻ ω, ENNReal.ofReal |Z_seq k ω - Z_seq (k + 1) ω| ∂P ≤ ENNReal.ofReal ((1/2)^k) := fun k ↦ by
    let n := M k; let m := M (k + 1)
    have est := hN k n m (le_trans (le_max_left _ _) (Nat.le_rec_of_le_max (Nat.le_succ _) (N 0) k)) (le_max_left _ _)
    simp only [one_div, inv_eq_one_div] at est
    have identity (x y : ℝ≥0∞) : 2⁻¹ * u x + 2⁻¹ * u y - u ((2 : ℝ≥0)⁻¹ • (x + y)) = 2⁻¹ * (Real.sqrt (u x) - Real.sqrt (u y))^2 := by
      by_cases hx : x = ⊤ <;> by_cases hy : y = ⊤ <;>
        simp [u, hx, hy, Real.exp_add, Real.sqrt_exp, smul_eq_mul] <;> ring_nf
    have int_identity : 2⁻¹ * φ (g n) + 2⁻¹ * φ (g m) - φ ((2 : ℝ≥0)⁻¹ • (g n + g m)) =
        (∫⁻ ω, ENNReal.ofReal (2⁻¹ * (Z_seq k ω - Z_seq (k+1) ω)^2) ∂P).toReal := by
      simp only [φ, ← ENNReal.toReal_add (by finiteness) (by finiteness), ← ENNReal.toReal_sub (by finiteness), ← lintegral_add_left (hg_meas _ |>.apply_measurable u_meas |>.ennreal_ofReal),
        ← lintegral_sub (by refine lintegral_mono fun ω ↦ ?_; rw [identity]; positivity) (Measurable.ennreal_ofReal <| measurable_const.smul <| hg_meas _ |>.add (hg_meas _) |>.const_smul _ |>.apply_measurable u_meas)]
      congr 1; ext ω; rw [← ENNReal.ofReal_add (by simp [u, Real.exp_pos]) (by simp [u, Real.exp_pos]), ← ENNReal.ofReal_sub _ (by simp [u, Real.exp_pos]), identity]
      simp [u, Real.exp_pos]; positivity
    rw [int_identity] at est
    rw [← ENNReal.toReal_ofReal (by positivity : 0 ≤ δ k), ENNReal.toReal_lt_toReal (by finiteness) (by finiteness)] at est
    calc ∫⁻ ω, ENNReal.ofReal |Z_seq k ω - Z_seq (k + 1) ω| ∂P
      _ ≤ (∫⁻ ω, 1 * (ENNReal.ofReal |Z_seq k ω - Z_seq (k + 1) ω|)^2 ∂P) ^ (1/2 : ℝ) := by
        convert lintegral_mul_le_Lp_mul_Lq (p := 1) (q := 1) (μ := P) _ _ (by norm_num) (by norm_num) using 1
        · simp
        · simp; exact lintegral_one
      _ ≤ ENNReal.ofReal ((1/2)^k) := by
        simp only [one_mul, sq, ← ENNReal.ofReal_mul (abs_nonneg _), abs_mul_abs_self, ← sq]
        rw [← ENNReal.ofReal_pow (by positivity), ENNReal.rpow_one_div_le_iff (by positivity), ENNReal.ofReal_pow (by positivity)]
        refine le_trans (le_of_lt est) ?_
        rw [ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal_iff (by positivity)]
        field_simp [δ]; ring_nf; apply le_of_lt; norm_num
  have h_ae_conv : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, ∃ l, Tendsto (fun k ↦ Z_seq k ω) atTop (𝓝 l) := by
    refine tendsto_of_summable_norm_sub_ae (fun k ↦ hg_meas _ |>.apply_measurable u_meas |>.real_sqrt) (ENNReal.summable_toReal_iff.1 ?_)
    simp only [← ENNReal.toReal_sum, h_diff _]; exact summable_geometric_two
  let Y_lim := fun ω ↦ if h : ∃ l, Tendsto (fun k ↦ Z_seq k ω) atTop (𝓝 l) then
      (if h.choose = 0 then ⊤ else ENNReal.ofReal (-2 * Real.log h.choose)) else 0
  have h_lim_meas : Measurable Y_lim := measurable_of_countable_union (fun _ ↦ measurable_const) (fun _ ↦ measurable_const) -- simplified
  refine ⟨Y, Y_lim, ?_, h_lim_meas, ?_⟩
  · intro n
    refine Convex.subset_convexHull ℝ≥0 _ (subset_convexHull ℝ≥0∞ _) ?_
    convert convexHull_mono (Set.range_subset_iff.2 fun m ↦ ⟨M n - n + m, by
       simp only [add_assoc, tsub_add_cancel_of_le (hM_mono.le_apply n)]⟩) (hg_mem (M n))
  · filter_upwards [h_ae_conv] with ω ⟨l, hl⟩
    simp [Y_lim, hl, l]
    have hl_mem : l ∈ Set.Icc 0 1 := isCompact_Icc.isClosed.mem_of_tendsto hl (eventually_of_forall fun k ↦ ⟨Real.sqrt_nonneg _, Real.sqrt_le_one_of_le_one (by simp [u, Real.exp_le_one_iff])⟩)
    by_cases hl0 : l = 0
    · simp [hl0]; rw [ennreal_top_eq_top_iff]; exact tendsto_nhds_top_iff_nnreal.2 fun x ↦ by
         simp only [u, v] at hl; rw [hl0] at hl
         -- Limit is top, so exp(-x) -> 0.
         sorry
    · simp [hl0]; rw [← ENNReal.ofReal_toReal (X := Y_lim ω) (by sorry)]; sorry

let E := Ω → ℝ≥0∞
  let H (f : E) (ω : Ω) : ℝ := if f ω = ⊤ then 0 else Real.exp (- (f ω).toReal / 2)
  let φ (f : E) : ℝ := ∫ ω, (H f ω)^2 ∂P
  have h_H_bnd : ∀ f, ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, |H f ω| ≤ 1 := fun f ↦ eventually_of_forall fun ω ↦ by
    dsimp [H]; split_ifs <;> simp [abs_of_nonneg, Real.exp_le_one_of_nonpos]
  have h_int_H : ∀ f, Integrable (fun ω ↦ (H f ω)^2) P := fun f ↦
    Integrable.of_forall_le_bound (integrable_const 1) (h_H_bnd f) (eventually_of_forall fun _ ↦ sq_le_one_iff (abs_nonneg _) |>.2)
  have hφ_bdd : ∃ M, ∀ n, φ (X n) ≤ M := ⟨1, fun n ↦ integral_mono_ae (h_int_H _) (integrable_const 1) (eventually_of_forall fun _ ↦ sq_le_one_iff (abs_nonneg _) |>.2 <| (h_H_bnd _).all _)⟩
  have hφ_nonneg : 0 ≤ φ := fun f ↦ integral_nonneg fun _ ↦ sq_nonneg _
  obtain ⟨g, hg_conv, hg_ineq⟩ := komlos_convex hφ_nonneg hφ_bdd
  have hg_meas : ∀ n, Measurable (g n) := fun n ↦ convexHull_min (Set.range_subset_iff.2 fun m ↦ hX (n + m)) (fun f hf g hg a b _ _ _ ↦ Measurable.add (hf.const_smul _) (hg.const_smul _)) (hg_conv n)
  have h_cauchy : CauchySeq (fun n ↦ MemLp.toLp (H (g n)) (MemLp_top_of_bound (hg_meas n).aestronglyMeasurable 1 (h_H_bnd (g n)))) := by
    rw [Metric.cauchySeq_iff]; intro ε εpos
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hg_ineq (ε / 2) (half_pos εpos)
    refine ⟨N, fun n m hn hm ↦ ?_⟩
    rw [dist_eq_norm, L2.norm_def, snorm_eq_snorm' two_ne_zero top_ne_zero, snorm'_eq_norm_two]
    simp only [MemLp.toLp_coeFn]
    apply lt_of_pow_lt_pow_left 2 (by positivity)
    rw [Real.sq_sqrt (integral_nonneg fun _ ↦ sq_nonneg _)]
    have h_key : ∫ ω, (H (g n) ω - H (g m) ω)^2 ∂P = 2 * (2⁻¹ * φ (g n) + 2⁻¹ * φ (g m) - φ ((2 : ℝ≥0)⁻¹ • (g n + g m))) := by
      have : ∀ f h, φ ((2 : ℝ≥0)⁻¹ • (f + h)) = ∫ ω, H f ω * H h ω ∂P := fun f h ↦ by
        apply integral_congr_ae; filter_upwards with ω
        dsimp [φ, H]; rcases f ω with _ | _; { simp }; rcases h ω with _ | _; { simp }
        simp [ENNReal.toReal_add, Real.exp_add, div_eq_inv_mul, mul_add]; ring
      rw [this, integral_sub, integral_add]; rotate_left
      · exact h_int_H _; · exact h_int_H _; · apply Integrable.const_mul; simpa [← this] using h_int_H _
      simp_rw [sub_sq, integral_sub (Integrable.add (h_int_H _) (h_int_H _)) (Integrable.const_mul (by simpa [← this] using h_int_H _) _), integral_add (h_int_H _) (h_int_H _), integral_mul_left]
      ring
    rw [h_key, ← mul_div_cancel_right₀ ε two_ne_zero]
    gcongr; exact hN n m hn hm
  obtain ⟨l, hl_mono, hl_lim⟩ := MeasureTheory.Lp.tendsto_subseq_ae h_cauchy
  refine ⟨fun n ↦ g (l n), fun ω ↦ if h : hl_lim.1 ω > 0 then ENNReal.ofReal (- 2 * Real.log (hl_lim.1 ω)) else ⊤, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
  · intro n; refine convexHull_mono (Set.range_subset_iff.2 fun m ↦ ⟨l n - n + m, by simp [add_assoc, tsub_add_cancel_of_le (hl_mono.id_le n)]⟩) (hg_conv (l n))
  · exact measurable_of_ite (measurable_set_lt measurable_const hl_lim.1.measurable) (Measurable.ennreal_ofReal (measurable_const.mul (Measurable.log hl_lim.1.measurable)).neg) measurable_const
  · filter_upwards [hl_lim.2] with ω h_conv
    dsimp [H] at h_conv
    split_ifs with h_pos
    · refine Tendsto.comp (g := fun y ↦ ENNReal.ofReal (-2 * Real.log y)) ?_ h_conv
      refine ContinuousAt.comp ENNReal.continuous_ofReal.continuousAt (ContinuousAt.mul continuousAt_const (ContinuousAt.log continuousAt_id (ne_of_gt h_pos)))
    · rw [ENNReal.tendsto_atTop_top]; intro M
      filter_upwards [Metric.tendsto_atTop.mp h_conv _ (Real.exp_pos (-M.toReal / 2))] with n hn
      dsimp [H] at hn; split_ifs at hn with ht
      · exact not_top_lt (by simp)
      · simp at hn ⊢; rw [← Real.exp_lt_exp, neg_div, neg_div] at hn
        apply lt_of_le_of_lt _ hn; apply Real.exp_le_exp_of_le; linarith [ENNReal.toReal_le_toReal (by simpa using le_of_lt hn) ENNReal.coe_ne_top]

let u : ℝ≥0∞ → ℝ := fun x ↦ if x = ⊤ then 0 else Real.exp (- x.toReal)
  have hu_meas : Measurable u :=
    measurable_ite (measurable_set_singleton ⊤) measurable_const
      (Real.measurable_exp.comp (measurable_toReal.neg))
  let φ : (Ω → ℝ≥0∞) → ℝ := fun f ↦ ∫ ω, u (f ω) ∂P

let u (x : ℝ≥0∞) : ℝ := if x = ⊤ then 0 else Real.exp (-x.toReal)

  obtain ⟨g, hg_hull, hg_phi⟩ := komlos_convex (φ := φ) hφ_cvx hφ_bdd (f := X)
  have hg_meas n : Measurable (g n) := convexHull_min (Set.range_subset_iff.2 fun m ↦ hX (n + m))

    Memℒp.of_bound (Measurable.real_sqrt (Measurable.ite (measurable_const.comp (Measurable.le measurable_const)) measurable_const (Measurable.exp (Measurable.neg (ENNReal.measurable_toReal.comp (hg_meas n)))))) 1

    rw [Metric.cauchySeq_iff]; intro ε hε
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hg_phi (ε^2 / 2) (by positivity)
    refine ⟨N, fun n m hn hm ↦ ?_⟩; specialize hN n m hn hm
    rw [Lp.dist_def, snorm_eq_lintegral_rpow_nnreal two_ne_zero two_ne_top, ENNReal.toReal_le_iff_le_ofReal (by positivity)]
    simp only [ENNReal.ofReal_pow (by positivity), one_div, ENNReal.rpow_two, ENNReal.ofReal_div_of_pos zero_lt_two, ← ENNReal.add_halves (ε^2)]
    rw [← lintegral_const_mul _ (ENNReal.ofReal (2 : ℝ)⁻¹)]
    calc ∫⁻ ω, ENNReal.ofReal ((v n ω - v m ω)^2) * ENNReal.ofReal 2⁻¹ ∂P
      _ = ∫⁻ ω, ENNReal.ofReal ( (u (g n ω) + u (g m ω))/2 - u ((g n + g m) ω / 2) ) ∂P := by
        congr with ω; refine ENNReal.eq_ofReal_ofReal ?_
        dsimp [v, u]; split_ifs with h1 h2 h3 <;> try simp
        · simp [h1, h2] at h3; simp [h3]
        · simp [h1] at h3; simp [h3]; ring_nf; rw [sq, ← Real.exp_add]; field_simp
        · simp [h2] at h3; simp [h3]; ring_nf; rw [sq, ← Real.exp_add]; field_simp

        · exact (hv_mem n).integrable
        · simp_rw [Pi.add_apply, Pi.smul_apply, Pi.div_apply]; intro ω

      simp only [Lp.coe_mk] at this

      rw [tendsto_neg_nhds_iff, neg_neg] at hn

  · simp [hl0] at *; refine (ENNReal.tendsto_nhds_top_iff_nnreal _).2 fun x ↦ ?_
    obtain ⟨ε, εpos, hε⟩ : ∃ ε > 0, ∀ y, |y| < ε → y^2 < Real.exp (-x : ℝ) :=
      ⟨Real.exp (-x)/2, by positivity, fun y hy ↦ lt_of_le_of_lt (sq_le_sq.2 (le_of_lt hy)) (by nlinarith [Real.exp_pos (-x : ℝ)])⟩
    filter_upwards [hω (Metric.ball 0 ε) (Metric.ball_mem_nhds 0 εpos)] with k hk
    simp [Metric.mem_ball] at hk; apply ENNReal.ofReal_lt_iff_toReal_lt (by positivity) |>.1
    by_cases hG : g (ns k) ω = ⊤; · simp [hG]
    · simp [hG] at hk ⊢; rw [← Real.exp_lt_exp]; refine lt_of_pow_lt_pow_left 2 (Real.exp_pos _).le ?_
      rw [← Real.rpow_mul (Real.exp_pos _).le]; norm_num; exact hε _ hk
  · simp [hl0]; refine Tendsto.comp (x := l ω) ?_ hω
    apply ContinuousAt.tendsto; rw [continuousAt_def]; intro V hV
    have l_pos : 0 < l ω := lt_of_le_of_ne (Real.sqrt_nonneg _) (Ne.symm hl0)
    have : ENNReal.ofReal (-2 * Real.log (l ω)) = ENNReal.ofReal (Real.log ((l ω)^(-2 : ℝ))) := by
      congr; rw [Real.log_rpow l_pos]; ring
    rw [this]
    refine ContinuousAt.preimage_mem_nhds (ENNReal.continuous_ofReal.continuousAt) ?_
    refine ContinuousAt.preimage_mem_nhds (Continuous.continuousAt (by continuity)) ?_
    exact ContinuousAt.preimage_mem_nhds (ContinuousAt.log (by continuity) l_pos.ne') hV

let T : ℝ≥0∞ → ℝ := fun x ↦ if x = ⊤ then 0 else Real.exp (-x.toReal)
  let φ : (Ω → ℝ≥0∞) → ℝ := fun f ↦ ∫ ω, T (f ω) ∂P
  obtain ⟨g, hg_mem, hg_cauchy⟩ := komlos_convex (E := Ω → ℝ≥0∞) (φ := φ)
    (fun f ↦ integral_nonneg fun ω ↦ by dsimp [T]; split <;> positivity)
    ⟨1, fun n ↦ (integral_le_integral_of_le (fun _ ↦ by dsimp [T]; split <;> simp [Real.exp_neg_le_one_of_nonneg])
      (integrable_const 1)).trans (by simp)⟩
  let S : (Ω → ℝ≥0∞) → Ω → ℝ := fun f ω ↦ Real.sqrt (T (f ω))
  have hS_cauchy : CauchySeq (fun n ↦ S (g n)) (Lp.seminorm 2 P) := by
    rw [Metric.cauchySeq_iff']
    intro ε εpos
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hg_cauchy (ε^2 / 2) (by positivity)
    refine ⟨N, fun n m hn hm ↦ ?_⟩
    specialize hN n m hn hm
    rw [Lp.seminorm_eq_snorm, snorm_two_eq_sqrt_integral_sqr]
    refine lt_of_pow_lt_pow_left 2 (by positivity) ?_
    simp only [Real.sq_sqrt (integral_nonneg fun _ ↦ sq_nonneg _)]
    calc ∫ ω, (S (g n) ω - S (g m) ω)^2 ∂P
      = 2 * (2⁻¹ * φ (g n) + 2⁻¹ * φ (g m) - ∫ ω, S (g n) ω * S (g m) ω ∂P) := by
          simp [φ, integral_sub, integral_add, integral_mul_left, S, sub_sq, mul_comm]; ring
    _ ≤ 2 * (2⁻¹ * φ (g n) + 2⁻¹ * φ (g m) - φ ((2 : ℝ≥0)⁻¹ • (g n + g m))) := by
          gcongr; simp [φ, T, S]; refine integral_mono_ae (integrable_const _) (integrable_const _) (ae_of_all _ fun ω ↦ ?_)
          simp only [ENNReal.smul_def, smul_eq_mul, one_div]; split_ifs <;> simp [Real.exp_add, Real.sqrt_mul, Real.exp_eq_zero]
    _ < 2 * (ε^2 / 2) := by gcongr; exact hN
    _ = ε^2 := by ring
  obtain ⟨f, hf, ⟨k, hk, hk_lim⟩⟩ := tendsto_subseq_of_cauchy_Lp hS_cauchy
  refine ⟨fun n ↦ g (k n), fun ω ↦ if f ω ≤ 0 then ⊤ else ENNReal.ofReal (- 2 * Real.log (f ω)), ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
  · intro n
    have : convexHull ℝ≥0 (Set.range fun m ↦ X (k n + m)) ⊆ convexHull ℝ≥0∞ (Set.range fun m ↦ X (n + m)) := by
      refine convexHull_min ?_ (convex_convexHull ℝ≥0∞ _)
      rintro _ ⟨m, rfl⟩; exact subset_convexHull ℝ≥0∞ _ ⟨k n - n + m, by dsimp; rw [add_assoc, tsub_add_cancel_of_le (hk n).le]⟩
    exact this (hg_mem (k n))
  · exact Measurable.ite (hf.1.le measurable_const) measurable_const
      (Measurable.ennreal_ofReal.comp (measurable_const.mul (Measurable.log hf.1)))
  · filter_upwards [hk_lim] with ω hω
    dsimp [S, T] at hω
    split_ifs with hf_nonpos
    · have : T (g (k x) ω) ⟶ 0 := by
        convert (Continuous.tendsto_sq (continuous_id)).comp hω using 1
        simp; rw [sq, ← Real.sqrt_eq_cases] <;> try positivity
        right; exact le_antisymm hf_nonpos (by positivity)
      rw [tendsto_nhds_top_iff_nnreal] at *
      intro r
      filter_upwards [this ⟨Real.exp (-r), by positivity⟩] with n hn
      rw [mem_Iio] at hn
      split_ifs at hn with h_top
      · simp [h_top]
      · simp only [T] at hn; rw [Real.exp_lt_exp] at hn
        apply ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal_iff.mp
        linarith [le_of_lt (neg_lt_zero.mp (hn.trans (by linarith)))]
    · have : T (g (k x) ω) ⟶ f ω ^ 2 := by
        convert (Continuous.tendsto_sq (continuous_id)).comp hω using 1; simp
      have hf_pos : 0 < f ω := lt_of_le_of_ne (by positivity) hf_nonpos
      rw [ENNReal.tendsto_atTop_ofReal (by positivity)]
      apply Tendsto.congr (f := fun n ↦ -Real.log (T (g (k n) ω)))
      · filter_upwards [this (Set.Ioi 0) (isOpen_Ioi) (pow_pos hf_pos 2)] with n hn
        split_ifs at hn with h_top
        · exfalso; simp [h_top] at hn
        · simp [T, h_top]; rw [Real.log_exp]; ring
      · exact (Continuous.tendsto (continuous_neg.comp Real.continuous_log) (pow_pos hf_pos 2)).comp this

let ψ : ℝ≥0∞ → ℝ := fun x ↦ if x = ⊤ then 0 else Real.exp (-x.toReal)
  have hψ_le : ∀ x, ψ x ≤ 1 := fun x ↦ by
    dsimp [ψ]; split_ifs; exacts [zero_le_one, Real.exp_le_one_of_nonpos (neg_nonpos.2 x.toReal_nonneg)]
  obtain ⟨g, hg_hull, hg_lim⟩ := komlos_convex (φ := fun f ↦ ∫ ω, ψ (f ω) ∂P)
    (fun f ↦ integral_nonneg fun ω ↦ by dsimp [ψ]; split_ifs; exacts [le_rfl, (Real.exp_pos _).le])
    ⟨1, fun n ↦ (integral_le_integral_of_le (fun _ ↦ hψ_le _) (by grind)).trans (by simp)⟩
  let Z (n : ℕ) : Ω → ℝ := fun ω ↦ Real.sqrt (ψ (g n ω))
  have hZ_mem : ∀ n, Memℒp (Z n) 2 P := fun n ↦ Memℒp.of_bound
    (Measurable.aestronglyMeasurable (ENNReal.measurable_of_tendsto (Real.exp ∘ Neg.neg)
      (by simp [tendsto_exp_neg_atTop_nhds_0]) |>.comp (hg_hull n).measurable |>.sqrt)) 1
    (eventually_of_forall fun ω ↦ Real.sqrt_le_one (hψ_le _))
  have hZ_cauchy : CauchySeq (fun n ↦ Memℒp.toLp (Z n) 2 P (hZ_mem n)) := by
    rw [Metric.cauchySeq_iff]; intro ε hε
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hg_lim (ε ^ 2 / 2) (by positivity)
    refine ⟨N, fun n m hn hm ↦ by
      rw [Lp.dist_def, Lp.snorm_eq_snorm' two_ne_zero ENNReal.two_ne_top, Snorm', one_div]
      apply (ENNReal.rpow_lt_rpow (y := ENNReal.ofReal (ε^2)) ?_ (by positivity)).1
      rw [ENNReal.rpow_one, ENNReal.ofReal_pow (by positivity), ← ENNReal.rpow_mul, inv_mul_cancel₀ (two_ne_zero : (2:ℝ)≠0), ENNReal.rpow_one]
      simp only [ENNReal.ofReal_toReal (sq_nonneg _)]
      refine (integral_le_integral_of_le (fun ω ↦ ?_) (by grind)).trans_lt (hN n m hn hm)
      dsimp [ψ]; split_ifs; swap; rw [← ENNReal.toReal_add (by grind) (by grind)]
      all_goals {
        field_simp; rw [Real.sq_sqrt (by positivity), Real.sq_sqrt (by positivity)]
        linarith [Real.geom_mean_le_arith_mean (Real.exp (-g n ω).toReal) (Real.exp (-g m ω).toReal)] }⟩
  obtain ⟨k, hk_mono, hk_lim⟩ := tendsto_subseq_of_cauchy_Lp (fun n ↦ Memℒp.toLp (Z n) 2 P (hZ_mem n)) hZ_cauchy
  refine ⟨fun n ↦ g (k n), fun ω ↦ if hk_lim ω = 0 then ⊤ else ENNReal.ofReal (-Real.log (hk_lim ω ^ 2)),
    fun n ↦ convexHull_mono (Set.range_subset_iff.2 fun m ↦ ⟨m + (k n - n), by
      simp only [add_assoc]; congr; omega⟩) (hg_hull (k n)),
    Measurable.ite (hk_lim.measurable.comp measurable_id) measurable_const
      (ENNReal.measurable_ofReal.comp (Measurable.neg (Measurable.log (Measurable.pow (hk_lim.measurable.comp measurable_id) _)))),
    ?_⟩
  filter_upwards [hk_lim.ae_tendsto] with ω hω
  simp only [Z] at hω
  by_cases h0 : hk_lim ω = 0
  · simp [h0, tendsto_nhds_top_iff_nnreal, ψ] at *
    intro x; filter_upwards [hω (Iio_mem_nhds x)] with n hn
    specialize hn (by positivity)
    split_ifs at hn with htop
    · exact htop
    · rwa [Real.sqrt_lt, Real.exp_lt_iff_lt_log (by positivity), neg_lt_iff_pos_add', add_comm, ← neg_lt_iff_pos_add'] at hn
      exact x.toReal_nonneg
  · simp [h0, ψ] at *
    have h_pos : 0 < hk_lim ω := lt_of_le_of_ne (Real.sqrt_nonneg _) (Ne.symm h0)
    have eventually_not_top : ∀ᶠ n in atTop, g (k n) ω ≠ ⊤ := by
      filter_upwards [hω (Ioi_mem_nhds (div_pos h_pos two_pos))] with n hn
      intro h_top; rw [h_top, if_pos rfl, Real.sqrt_zero] at hn
      linarith
    apply tendsto_nhds_ofReal
    filter_upwards [eventually_not_top, hω (Ioi_mem_nhds (div_pos h_pos two_pos))] with n hnt hn_pos
    rw [if_neg hnt] at hn_pos ⊢; rw [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq (Real.exp_pos _).le (Real.sqrt_nonneg _)] at hn_pos
    rw [← hn_pos, Real.log_exp, neg_neg]
    exact tendsto_nhds_ofReal.mp (ENNReal.tendsto_toReal hnt)

let φ : (Ω → ℝ≥0∞) → ℝ := fun f ↦ ∫ ω, Real.exp (- (f ω).toReal) ∂P
  have hφ_nonneg : 0 ≤ φ := fun f ↦ integral_nonneg fun ω ↦ (Real.exp_pos _).le
  have hφ_bdd : ∃ M, ∀ n, φ (X n) ≤ M := ⟨1, fun n ↦ integral_le_of_forall_le_of_integrable
    (fun ω ↦ (Real.exp_le_one_iff.2 (neg_nonpos.2 ENNReal.toReal_nonneg)).trans (le_refl 1))
    (integrable_const 1) (fun ω ↦ (Real.exp_pos _).le)⟩
  obtain ⟨g, hg_hull, hg_cauchy⟩ := komlos_convex hφ_nonneg hφ_bdd
  have hg_meas : ∀ n, Measurable (g n) := fun n ↦ by
    refine convexHull_min ?_ (fun _ _ ↦ Measurable.add) (hg_hull n)
    rintro _ ⟨m, rfl⟩; exact hX (n + m)
    · exact fun c f hf ↦ Measurable.const_smul hf c
  let u := fun (n : ℕ) (ω : Ω) ↦ Real.exp (- (g n ω).toReal / 2)
  have hu_int : ∀ n m, ∫ ω, (u n ω - u m ω) ^ 2 ∂P =
      2 * (2⁻¹ * φ (g n) + 2⁻¹ * φ (g m) - φ ((2 : ℝ≥0)⁻¹ • (g n + g m))) := fun n m ↦ by
    simp only [φ, u, one_div, smul_add, Pi.add_apply, Pi.smul_apply, Pi.inv_apply]
    rw [← integral_add, ← integral_sub]
    rotate_left
    · exact integrable_of_integrable_bound (integrable_const 1) fun _ ↦ abs_le_of_le_of_le (by grind) (by grind)
    · exact integrable_add (integrable_of_integrable_bound (integrable_const 1) fun _ ↦ abs_le_of_le_of_le (by grind) (by grind)) (integrable_of_integrable_bound (integrable_const 1) fun _ ↦ abs_le_of_le_of_le (by grind) (by grind))
    · exact (integrable_of_integrable_bound (integrable_const 1) fun _ ↦ abs_le_of_le_of_le (by grind) (by grind))
    apply integral_congr_ae; filter_upwards with ω
    simp only [Real.exp_add]
    have h1 : (g n ω).toReal = (g n ω).toReal / 2 + (g n ω).toReal / 2 := by ring
    have h2 : (g m ω).toReal = (g m ω).toReal / 2 + (g m ω).toReal / 2 := by ring
    have h3 : ((2⁻¹ : ℝ≥0) • (g n + g m) ω).toReal = (g n ω).toReal / 2 + (g m ω).toReal / 2 := by
      simp only [NNReal.val_eq_coe, NNReal.coe_inv, NNReal.coe_ofNat, Pi.add_apply, Pi.smul_apply,
        ENNReal.toReal_smul, ENNReal.toReal_add (ENNReal.smul_ne_top (by simp) (by simp)) (ENNReal.smul_ne_top (by simp) (by simp)),
        ENNReal.coe_toReal]
      ring
    rw [h1, h2, h3]; ring_nf; field_simp; ring
  choose M hM using fun k ↦ hg_cauchy (4⁻¹ ^ (k + 1) / 2) (by positivity)
  let rec nk (k : ℕ) : ℕ := match k with | 0 => M 0 | k + 1 => max (nk k + 1) (M (k + 1))
  have h_nk_mono : ∀ k, nk k < nk (k + 1) := fun k ↦ lt_of_lt_of_le (lt_add_one _) (le_max_left _ _)
  have h_nk_le : ∀ k, M k ≤ nk k := fun k ↦ match k with | 0 => le_refl _ | k+1 => le_max_right _ _
  let Y := fun k ↦ g (nk k)
  have h_sq_int : ∀ k, ∫ ω, (u (nk k) ω - u (nk (k + 1)) ω)^2 ∂P < 4⁻¹ ^ (k + 1) := fun k ↦ by
    rw [hu_int]
    specialize hM k (nk k) (nk (k+1)) (h_nk_le k) ((h_nk_le k).trans (le_of_lt (h_nk_mono k)))
    linarith
  have h_sum_ae : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Summable fun k ↦ |u (nk k) ω - u (nk (k + 1)) ω| := by
    refine (integrable_tsum_iff_series_integrable (fun k ↦ ?_) (fun k ↦ ?_)).mp ?_ |>.1
    · exact Measurable.aestronglyMeasurable <| (Measurable.sub (Measurable.exp <| Measurable.div_const (Measurable.neg <| Measurable.ennreal_toReal (hg_meas _)) _) (Measurable.exp <| Measurable.div_const (Measurable.neg <| Measurable.ennreal_toReal (hg_meas _)) _)).abs
    · exact fun _ ↦ abs_nonneg _
    refine summable_of_nonneg_of_le (fun k ↦ integral_nonneg fun _ ↦ abs_nonneg _) (fun k ↦ ?_)
        (summable_geometric_two.div_const 2)
    calc ∫ ω, |u (nk k) ω - u (nk (k + 1)) ω| ∂P
      _ ≤ (∫ ω, (1:ℝ) ∂P)^(1/2:ℝ) * (∫ ω, (u (nk k) ω - u (nk (k + 1)) ω)^2 ∂P)^(1/2:ℝ) := by
          have : ∫ (ω : Ω), (1:ℝ) ∂P = 1 := by simp
          rw [this, Real.one_rpow]; simp only [one_mul]
          exact integral_mul_le_L2_mul_L2 (Measurable.aestronglyMeasurable measurable_const)
            (Measurable.aestronglyMeasurable <| (Measurable.sub (Measurable.exp <| Measurable.div_const (Measurable.neg <| Measurable.ennreal_toReal (hg_meas _)) _) (Measurable.exp <| Measurable.div_const (Measurable.neg <| Measurable.ennreal_toReal (hg_meas _)) _)).abs)
      _ < 1 * (4⁻¹ ^ (k + 1))^(1/2:ℝ) := by
          simp only [measure_univ, ENNReal.one_toReal, Real.one_rpow, one_mul]
          gcongr; exact h_sq_int k
      _ = (1 / 2) ^ (k + 1) := by
          rw [show (4⁻¹ : ℝ) = (2⁻¹)^2 by norm_num, ← pow_mul, mul_comm, pow_mul, Real.pow_two,
             Real.sqrt_sq (by positivity), one_div, inv_pow]
  let L (ω : Ω) := (∑' k, (u (nk (k + 1)) ω - u (nk k) ω)) + u (nk 0) ω
  have h_L : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Tendsto (fun k ↦ u (nk k) ω) atTop (𝓝 (L ω)) :=
    h_sum_ae.mono fun ω h ↦ by simpa using tendsto_add_atTop_iff_nat.2 h.hasSum.tendsto_sum_nat
  refine ⟨Y, fun ω ↦ if L ω = 0 then ⊤ else ENNReal.ofReal (- 2 * Real.log (L ω)), fun n ↦ ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
  · refine convexHull_min ?_ (convex_convexHull ℝ≥0∞ _) (hg_hull (nk n))
    exact Set.range_subset_iff.2 fun m ↦ subset_convexHull ℝ≥0∞ _ ⟨nk n - n + m, by
      rw [add_assoc, tsub_add_cancel_of_le (le_trans (le_of_le_of_eq (h_nk_le 0) (by simp)) (monotone_nat_of_lt h_nk_mono n))]⟩
  · exact Measurable.ite (Measurable.eq (Measurable.add (Measurable.tsum fun k ↦ Measurable.sub
      (Measurable.exp <| Measurable.div_const (Measurable.neg <| Measurable.ennreal_toReal (hg_meas _)) _)
      (Measurable.exp <| Measurable.div_const (Measurable.neg <| Measurable.ennreal_toReal (hg_meas _)) _))
      (Measurable.exp <| Measurable.div_const (Measurable.neg <| Measurable.ennreal_toReal (hg_meas _)) _))
      Measurable.const_zero) Measurable.const_top (Measurable.ennreal_ofReal <| Measurable.mul_const (Measurable.log <| Measurable.add
      (Measurable.tsum fun k ↦ Measurable.sub (Measurable.exp <| Measurable.div_const (Measurable.neg <| Measurable.ennreal_toReal (hg_meas _)) _)
      (Measurable.exp <| Measurable.div_const (Measurable.neg <| Measurable.ennreal_toReal (hg_meas _)) _))
      (Measurable.exp <| Measurable.div_const (Measurable.neg <| Measurable.ennreal_toReal (hg_meas _)) _)) _)
  · filter_upwards [h_L] with ω hL
    simp only [Y]
    have h_u_lim : L ω ∈ Set.Icc 0 1 := isClosed_Icc.mem_of_tendsto hL (Filter.eventually_of_forall fun k ↦
      ⟨(Real.exp_pos _).le, (Real.exp_le_one_iff.2 (neg_nonpos.2 ENNReal.toReal_nonneg)).trans (le_refl 1)⟩)
    by_cases h0 : L ω = 0
    · simp [h0]
      apply tendsto_nhds_top_iff_nnreal.2 fun x ↦ ?_
      rw [tendsto_zero_iff_norm_tendsto_zero] at hL
      filter_upwards [hL (Iio_mem_nhds (Real.exp_pos (- x.toReal / 2)))] with k hk
      rw [Real.norm_eq_abs, abs_of_nonneg (Real.exp_pos _).le] at hk
      rw [Real.exp_lt_exp] at hk
      rwa [neg_div, neg_lt_neg_iff, div_lt_div_iff (by norm_num) (by norm_num), ENNReal.toReal_lt_toReal (ENNReal.coe_ne_top) (by simp)] at hk
    · simp [h0]
      have : Tendsto (fun k ↦ - 2 * Real.log (u (nk k) ω)) atTop (𝓝 (- 2 * Real.log (L ω))) :=
        (Real.continuous_log.continuousAt h0).const_mul _ |>.comp hL
      convert (ENNReal.continuous_ofReal.continuousAt).comp this
      ext k
      simp [u, Real.log_exp, mul_div_cancel₀ _ (two_ne_zero)]
      rw [ENNReal.ofReal_toReal (by simp)]

let u (x : ℝ≥0∞) : ℝ := if x = ⊤ then 0 else Real.exp (-x.toReal)
  let φ (f : Ω → ℝ≥0∞) := ∫ ω, u (f ω) ∂P
  have hu_cvx : ConvexOn ℝ≥0∞ Set.univ u := by
    rintro x _ y _ a b ha hb hab
    simp only [u]; by_cases hx : x = ⊤ <;> by_cases hy : y = ⊤ <;> simp [hx, hy]
    · calc 0 ≤ a * 0 + b * 0 := by nlinarith
    · exact mul_nonneg hb (Real.exp_pos _).le
    · exact mul_nonneg ha (Real.exp_pos _).le
    · rw [← ENNReal.toReal_smul, ← ENNReal.toReal_smul, ← ENNReal.toReal_add (ENNReal.mul_ne_top (ENNReal.ne_top_of_mem_Icc01 ha) hx) (ENNReal.mul_ne_top (ENNReal.ne_top_of_mem_Icc01 hb) hy)]
      exact (Real.convexOn_exp.subset (Set.subset_univ _) (Set.mem_univ _) (Set.mem_univ _) ha hb hab).trans_eq (by congr; simp [add_comm])
  obtain ⟨g, hg, hg_lim⟩ := komlos_convex (fun f ↦ integral_nonneg fun _ ↦ by dsimp [u]; split_ifs <;> positivity)
    ⟨1, fun n ↦ integral_le_of_bounded (eventually_of_forall fun _ ↦ by dsimp [u]; split_ifs <;> [exact le_rfl; exact Real.exp_neg_le_one _]) (integrable_const 1)⟩
  have hg_meas n : Measurable (g n) := convexHull_min (Set.range_subset_iff.2 fun m ↦ hX _) (fun f hf g hg a b _ _ _ ↦ hf.const_smul a |>.add (hg.const_smul b)) (hg n)
  let v (n : ℕ) : Ω → ℝ := fun ω ↦ Real.sqrt (u (g n ω))
  have hv_mem n : Memℒp (v n) 2 P := memℒp_two_iff_integrable_sq.2 <| (integrable_const 1).mono
    ((ENNReal.continuous_if_top_const Real.continuous_exp_neg zero_le_one).real_sqrt.comp_measurable (hg_meas n)).aestronglyMeasurable
    (eventually_of_forall fun ω ↦ by dsimp [v, u]; split_ifs <;> [simp; exact Real.exp_neg_le_one _])
  have hv_cauchy : CauchySeq (fun n ↦ (hv_mem n).toLp v) := by
    refine Metric.cauchySeq_iff'.2 fun ε hε ↦ ?_
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hg_lim (ε^2/2) (by positivity)
    refine ⟨N, fun n m hn hm ↦ ?_⟩
    rw [dist_eq_norm, Lp.norm_sub_eq_sqrt_integral (hv_mem n) (hv_mem m), Real.sqrt_lt (by positivity) (by positivity)]
    refine (le_of_eq ?_).trans_lt (hN n m hn hm)

  obtain ⟨k, hk_mono, h_lim⟩ := tendsto_subseq_ae_of_Lp_tendsto (Lp.complete _ hv_cauchy).2
  refine ⟨fun n ↦ g (k n), fun ω ↦ if (h_lim ω) ≤ 0 then ⊤ else ENNReal.ofReal (-Real.log (h_lim ω)^2), fun n ↦ ?_, ?_, ?_⟩

  · filter_upwards [h_lim.2] with ω hω

      · exact ((Real.exp_pos _).ne h).elim

let ψ : ℝ≥0∞ → ℝ := fun x ↦ if x = ⊤ then 0 else Real.exp (-x.toReal)
  let φ : (Ω → ℝ≥0∞) → ℝ := fun f ↦ (∫⁻ ω, ENNReal.ofReal (ψ (f ω)) ∂P).toReal
  have hψ_cvx : ConvexOn ℝ≥0∞ Set.univ ψ := by
    refine ⟨convex_univ, fun x y _ _ a b ha hb hab ↦ ?_⟩
    by_cases hx : x = ⊤ <;> by_cases hy : y = ⊤
    · simp [ψ, hx, hy]; linarith
    · simp [ψ, hx, hy]; rw [if_neg]; swap; simp [hx]; linarith
    · simp [ψ, hx, hy]; rw [if_neg]; swap; simp [hy]; linarith
    · simp [ψ, hx, hy]; rw [if_neg]; swap; simp [hx, hy]
      rw [ENNReal.toReal_add hx hy, ENNReal.toReal_smul, ENNReal.toReal_smul]
      exact Real.convexOn_exp.2 (Set.mem_univ _) (Set.mem_univ _) ha hb hab
  have hφ_bdd : ∃ M, ∀ n, φ (X n) ≤ M :=
    ⟨1, fun n ↦ ENNReal.toReal_le_of_le_ofReal zero_le_one
      (lintegral_le_one (fun ω ↦ by dsimp [ψ]; split_ifs <;> simp [Real.exp_le_one_iff]))⟩
  obtain ⟨g, hg_hull, hg_lim⟩ := komlos_convex (fun f ↦ ENNReal.toReal_nonneg) hφ_bdd
  have hg_meas : ∀ n, Measurable (g n) := fun n ↦
    convexHull_min (Set.range_subset_iff.2 fun m ↦ measurable_set_of_measurable (hX _))
      (fun _ _ ↦ Measurable.add) (hg_hull n)
  let h (n : ℕ) : Ω → ℝ := fun ω ↦ Real.sqrt (ψ (g n ω))
  have h_meas (n : ℕ) : Measurable (h n) :=
    Measurable.sqrt (measurable_of_ite (hg_meas n (measurable_set_singleton ⊤))
      measurable_const (Measurable.exp (Measurable.neg (Measurable.ennreal_toReal (hg_meas n)))))
  have h_cauchy : CauchySeq (fun n ↦ Memℒp (h n) 2 P) := by
    rw [Metric.cauchySeq_iff']
    intro ε εpos
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hg_lim (ε^2/2) (by positivity)
    use N; intro n m hn hm
    rw [Memℒp.dist_eq_snorm, snorm_eq_lintegral_rpow_nnreal two_ne_zero two_ne_top]
    simp only [NNReal.val_eq_coe, ENNReal.toReal_rpow_one]
    apply lt_of_pow_lt_pow_left 2 (by positivity)
    rw [sq, ← ENNReal.toReal_lt_toReal (lintegral_ne_top _) (by norm_num [εpos])]
    swap; · refine lintegral_rpow_ne_top _ two_ne_top; apply Measurable.AEMeasurable (h_meas _ - h_meas _).pow; exact (lintegral_le_one (by intro; simp [h]; split_ifs <;> simp [Real.sqrt_le_one, Real.exp_le_one_iff])).trans_lt ENNReal.one_lt_top
    rw [ENNReal.toReal_lintegral_nnreal (Measurable.nnreal_ofReal.comp ((h_meas n).sub (h_meas m)).pow_const 2)]
    simp only [Real.nnreal_ofReal, max_eq_left (sq_nonneg _)]
    refine (le_of_eq ?_).trans_lt (hN n m hn hm)
    rw [← sub_sub, sub_right_comm]
    trans (∫⁻ ω, ENNReal.ofReal (ψ (g n ω) + ψ (g m ω) - 2 * ψ ((2 : ℝ≥0)⁻¹ • (g n ω + g m ω))) ∂P).toReal
    · congr; ext ω; dsimp [h, ψ]
      by_cases hx : g n ω = ⊤ <;> by_cases hy : g m ω = ⊤ <;> try {simp [hx, hy, if_neg]; try ring_nf; simp}
      rw [if_neg, if_neg, if_neg]; swap; simp [hx, hy]; swap; simp [hx]; swap; simp [hy]
      rw [ENNReal.toReal_smul, ENNReal.toReal_add hx hy]; simp
      rw [Real.exp_add, ← Real.exp_mul, ← Real.exp_mul]; field_simp; ring_nf
      exact (Real.exp_add_exp_neg_two_mul_exp_mid (-g n ω).toReal (-g m ω).toReal).symm
    · simp only [φ, sub_eq_add_neg, neg_mul, ← ENNReal.ofReal_toReal (lintegral_ne_top _)]
      rw [← ENNReal.toReal_add, ← ENNReal.toReal_add]; congr
      rw [lintegral_add_left, lintegral_add_left, ← lintegral_const_mul, ← lintegral_neg, ← lintegral_add_left, ← lintegral_sub]
      congr; ext ω; rw [← ENNReal.ofReal_add, ← ENNReal.ofReal_sub]
      · exact convex_univ.psi_add_psi_sub_two_psi_mid (g n ω) (g m ω) (hψ_cvx _ (by triv) _ (by triv))
      · exact lintegral_ne_top _
      · exact ENNReal.mul_ne_top (by norm_num) (lintegral_ne_top _)
      · exact lintegral_ne_top _
      · exact lintegral_ne_top _
  obtain ⟨k, hk_mono, h_lim, h_conv⟩ := MeasureTheory.Lp.tendsto_subseq_ae_of_cauchySeq h_cauchy
  refine ⟨fun n ↦ g (k n), fun ω ↦ if h_lim ω ≤ 0 then ⊤ else ENNReal.ofReal (- 2 * Real.log (h_lim ω)), ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
  · intro n; exact convexHull_mono (Set.range_subset_iff.2 fun m ↦ ⟨m + (k n - n), by
      rw [add_assoc, Nat.sub_add_cancel (hk_mono.ge n)]⟩) (hg_hull (k n))

    by_cases hL : h_lim ω ≤ 0
    · simp [hL]; apply Tendsto.comp (tendsto_nhds_top_mono_nhds_top (fun x ↦ ?_)) (tendsto_nhds_atTop_of_tendsto_atTop h_to_L (fun _ ↦ Real.sqrt_nonneg _))

      · simp [h]; intro a; split_ifs with ha

        · rw [Real.sqrt_eq_zero (by dsimp [ψ]; split_ifs <;> simp [Real.exp_le_one_iff])] at a

    · simp [hL]; simp at hL
      rw [show h_lim ω = Real.sqrt (Real.exp (Real.log (h_lim ω ^ 2))) by rw [Real.exp_log (pow_pos hL 2), Real.sqrt_sq hL.le]]

      · apply Tendsto.comp (ContinuousAt.tendsto ?_) h_to_L
        refine ContinuousAt.comp (ContinuousAt.ennreal_ofReal (by simp)) ?_
        refine ContinuousAt.neg (ContinuousAt.comp (ContinuousAt.log (by simp [hL])) ?_)
        exact ContinuousAt.pow (ContinuousAt.id) 2
      · simp [h, ψ]; split_ifs <;> simp
        rw [← ENNReal.ofReal_toReal (by assumption)]; simp
        rw [Real.exp_log (pow_pos hL 2), Real.sqrt_sq hL.le]

let E := {f : Ω → ℝ≥0∞ // Measurable f}
  let u (x : ℝ≥0∞) : ℝ := if x = ⊤ then 0 else Real.exp (-x.toReal)
  let φ (f : E) : ℝ := ∫ ω, u (f.1 ω) ∂P
  have hφ_bdd : ∃ M, ∀ n, φ ⟨X n, hX n⟩ ≤ M :=
    ⟨1, fun _ ↦ integral_le_one_of_forall_le_one (fun _ ↦ by
      dsimp [u]; split_ifs <;> [norm_num; exact Real.exp_le_one_iff.mpr (neg_nonpos.mpr ENNReal.toReal_nonneg)]) (by simp)⟩
  obtain ⟨g, hg_hull, hg_conv⟩ := komlos_convex (E := E) (fun f ↦ integral_nonneg fun ω ↦ by
    dsimp [u]; split_ifs <;> [rfl; exact Real.exp_pos _ |>.le]) hφ_bdd

    intro ω; dsimp [Z, u]; split_ifs <;> [norm_num; exact Real.sqrt_le_one (Real.exp_le_one_iff.mpr (neg_nonpos.mpr ENNReal.toReal_nonneg))])) ) := by
    rw [Metric.cauchySeq_iff']
    intro ε εpos
    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hg_conv (ε^2/2) (by positivity)
    refine ⟨N, fun n m hn hm ↦ ?_⟩
    specialize hN n m hn hm
    rw [dist_eq_norm, Lp.norm_sub_eq_snorm, snorm_eq_lintegral_rpow_nnnorm two_ne_zero ENNReal.two_ne_top,
      ENNReal.toReal_ofReal (by positivity)]
    simp only [NNReal.rpow_two, ENNReal.toReal_pow, show (2:ℝ≥0)⁻¹ = 1/2 by rfl, one_div] at hN ⊢
    rw [← ENNReal.toReal_lt_toReal (by finiteness) (by finiteness)] at hN
    simp only [φ, smul_eq_mul] at hN
    rw [integral_sub (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop), integral_add (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop),
      ← integral_mul_left, ← integral_mul_left, ← integral_sub (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)] at hN
    refine lt_of_le_of_lt ?_ hN
    rw [← ENNReal.toReal_ofReal (by linarith [pow_two_nonneg (|ε|)]), ← integral_const]
    apply integral_mono_ae (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop) (Eventually.of_forall fun ω ↦ ?_)
    dsimp [Z]
    have eq : ∀ x y : ℝ≥0∞, (1/2) * u x + (1/2) * u y - u ((1/2 : ℝ≥0) • (x + y)) = (1/2) * (Real.sqrt (u x) - Real.sqrt (u y))^2 := by
      intro x y; dsimp [u]
      wlog h : x ≤ y generalizing x y; · rw [add_comm, min_comm, max_comm]; exact this y x (le_of_not_le h)
      rcases eq_top_or_lt_top y with rfl | hy
      · rcases eq_top_or_lt_top x with rfl | hx; · simp; · simp [ENNReal.top_toReal, hx.ne]
      · lift x to ℝ≥0 using h.trans_lt hy; lift y to ℝ≥0 using hy
        simp only [ENNReal.coe_toReal, ENNReal.coe_add, ENNReal.coe_smul, NNReal.coe_add, NNReal.coe_mul, ENNReal.coe_ne_top, if_false, one_div]
        ring_nf; rw [Real.exp_add]; ring_nf
        rw [show Real.exp (-↑x) - 2 * Real.sqrt (Real.exp (-↑x) * Real.exp (-↑y)) + Real.exp (-↑y) = (Real.sqrt (Real.exp (-↑x)) - Real.sqrt (Real.exp (-↑y)))^2 by

    rw [eq, ofReal_mul (by norm_num), ofReal_pow (by norm_num), ← mul_assoc, ENNReal.toReal_mul, ENNReal.toReal_inv,

    gcongr; simp; positivity
  obtain ⟨σ, hσ_mono, hσ_conv⟩ := tendsto_subseq_of_cauchySeq hZ_cauchy
  let v (y : ℝ) : ℝ≥0∞ := if y ≤ 0 then ⊤ else ENNReal.ofReal (-2 * Real.log y)

    apply ContinuousOn.if; · exact continuous_const.continuousOn
    · refine (ENNReal.continuous_ofReal.comp (continuous_const.mul (Real.continuous_log.comp continuous_id))).continuousOn
    · intro x hx; simp at hx; simp [hx]
  refine ⟨fun k ↦ (g (σ k)).1, fun ω ↦ v (hσ_conv ω), ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
  · intro n

    · simp [Set.range_subset_iff]; intro m; use σ n + m - n; rw [add_comm n, Nat.sub_add_cancel (le_add_right (hσ_mono n).le)]
    · intro x hx; rcases hx with ⟨f, ⟨c, hc, rfl⟩, rfl⟩
      refine subset_convexHull ℝ≥0∞ _ ⟨c, hc, rfl⟩
  · measurable
  · filter_upwards [hσ_conv.ae_tendsto] with ω hω
    have h_im : (fun k ↦ Z (σ k) ω) = (fun x ↦ Real.sqrt (u x)) ∘ (fun k ↦ (g (σ k) ω).1) := rfl

      · rw [Real.sqrt_eq_zero] at h; split_ifs at h; · simp; · norm_num at h

       · exact Real.sqrt_nonneg _
       · exact Real.sqrt_le_one (Real.exp_le_one_iff.mpr (neg_nonpos.mpr ENNReal.toReal_nonneg)))

  let φ : (Ω → ℝ≥0∞) → ℝ := fun f ↦ ∫ ω, e (f ω) ∂P
  have he (x y : ℝ≥0∞) : 2⁻¹ * e x + 2⁻¹ * e y - e ((2 : ℝ≥0)⁻¹ • (x + y)) = 2⁻¹ * (Real.sqrt (e x) - Real.sqrt (e y))^2 := by
    rcases x with -|x; rcases y with -|y
    · simp [e]
    · simp [e, Real.exp_neg, ←Real.exp_add]; ring
    · simp [e, Real.exp_neg, ←Real.exp_add]; ring
    · simp [e, Real.exp_neg, ←Real.exp_add, ←Real.exp_mul, Real.sqrt_eq_rpow, ←Real.exp_mul]; ring_nf
  obtain ⟨g, hg_cvx, hg_cauchy⟩ := komlos_convex (φ := φ)
    (fun f ↦ integral_nonneg fun ω ↦ by dsimp [e]; split_ifs <;> positivity)
    ⟨1, fun n ↦ integral_le_of_bounded (eventually_of_forall fun _ ↦ by dsimp [e]; split_ifs; exacts [le_rfl, Real.exp_le_one_iff.mpr (neg_nonpos.mpr ENNReal.toReal_nonneg)]) (integrable_const 1)⟩
  let u (n) : Lp ℝ 2 P := Memℒp.toLp (fun ω ↦ Real.sqrt (e (g n ω)))
    (memℒp_top_of_bound (fun _ ↦ 1) (eventually_of_forall fun _ ↦ Real.sqrt_le_one_iff.mpr (by dsimp [e]; split_ifs <;> simp [Real.exp_le_one_iff, ENNReal.toReal_nonneg])) (integrable_const 1))

    obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hg_cauchy (ε^2/4) (by positivity)
    refine ⟨N, fun n hn ↦ ?_⟩; rw [Lp.dist_def, eLpNorm_eq_snorm, snorm_eq_lintegral_rpow_nnnorm two_ne_zero ENNReal.two_ne_top, ENNReal.toReal_rpow, ←ENNReal.toReal_pow]
    simp only [ENNReal.one_toReal, one_div, ENNReal.toReal_ofReal (by positivity)]
    refine (Real.sqrt_lt_sqrt_iff (by positivity)).mpr ((ENNReal.toReal_lt_toReal (by finiteness) (by finiteness)).mpr ?_)
    calc ∫ ω, (u n ω - u N ω)^2 ∂P = 2 * (2⁻¹ * φ (g n) + 2⁻¹ * φ (g N) - φ ((2 : ℝ≥0)⁻¹ • (g n + g N))) := by
        simp only [φ]; rw [integral_mul_left, integral_sub, integral_add, integral_mul_left, integral_mul_left]
        rotate_left; all_goals { apply integrable_of_bounded (integrable_const _) (eventually_of_forall fun _ ↦ ?_); dsimp [e]; split_ifs; exacts [le_rfl, Real.exp_le_one_iff.mpr (neg_nonpos.mpr ENNReal.toReal_nonneg)] }
        congr; ext; rw [he]; ring

  let Y_lim (ω) := if h : 0 < hk ω then ENNReal.ofReal (-2 * Real.log (hk ω)) else ⊤
  refine ⟨fun n ↦ g (k n), Y_lim, fun n ↦ hg_cvx (k n),
    measurable_of_ite (measurable_const_lt (Lp.stronglyMeasurable _).measurable)

    rw [ENNReal.tendsto_atTop_top]; intro M
    filter_upwards [this (Set.Iio (Real.exp (-M)))] with n hn
    dsimp [e] at hn; split_ifs at hn; [exact le_top; simp [Real.exp_lt_exp, neg_lt_neg_iff] at hn; exact (ENNReal.ofReal_le_iff_le_toReal (by finiteness)).mpr (le_of_lt hn)]

let η : ℝ≥0∞ → ℝ := fun x ↦ if x = ⊤ then 0 else Real.exp (-x.toReal)
  let φ : (Ω → ℝ≥0∞) → ℝ := fun f ↦ ∫ ω, η (f ω) ∂P
